description: All rails grouped by power state (sleep domain). G3H = always present with AC, AON = always on with battery, S2-S0 = progressively more awake. Rail names verified against schematic PNGs pages 39, 43, 139-143.

domains.name: G3H
domains.description: Present whenever AC power is connected (pre-charger, pre-battery)

domains.name: AON
domains.description: Always on when battery or charger connected. Stays up in all sleep states.

domains.name: S2
domains.description: System sleep / standby. Memory retention active.
domains.pmu: UC260 (PP5V_S2) + SPMU/MPMU S2 bucks and LDOs

domains.name: S1
domains.description: Light sleep. Core SoC domains retained at low voltage.
domains.pmu: SPMU/MPMU S1 bucks + Austringer (CLVR VDDH) + CLVR2 S1 outputs

domains.name: S0_AWAKE
domains.description: Fully awake. SoC running, display on, all dynamic domains active.
domains.pmu: CLVR0/1/2 + SPMU/MPMU AWAKE bucks and switches
